infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Vin uses the camera to scan wine bottle labels so you can quickly add wines to your cellar.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Vin accesses your photo library so you can select wine label images to identify and catalog wines.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Vin uses your location to check local weather conditions and provide personalized wine pairing recommendations from your AI Sommelier.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Vin uses Face ID to securely sign you in without entering your password.

plugins.cameraPermission: Vin uses the camera to scan wine bottle labels so you can quickly add wines to your cellar.
